title: BEM-770 execute wake route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:22 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem769b_check_wake_smoke_result_retry.json')
prev_status=prev.get('status','unknown')
if prev_status=='workflow_run_wake_path_proven':
    status='wake_path_proven_next_claude_action_isolation'
    blocker=None
    next_action='isolate Claude Action/provider blocker'
else:
    status='direct_dispatch_fallback_installed'
    blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_RUN_WAKE_PATH_NOT_PROVEN','action':'Direct state-producing dispatch fallback installed.'}
    next_action='use direct state-producing fallback and continue real Claude runtime repair'
    script=Path('scripts/direct_claude_runtime_state_fallback.py')
    script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/claude_direct_runtime_fallback_state.json")\nREPORT=Path("governance/reports/claude_direct_runtime_fallback_report.md")\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\ndata={"schema_version":"claude_direct_runtime_fallback_state.v1","status":"direct_fallback_available","checked_at":now,"operator_role":"none","note":"This does not fake Claude response. It proves fallback state channel while real Claude runtime remains under repair."}\nSTATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nSTATE.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nREPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nREPORT.write_text("# Claude Direct Runtime Fallback"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Status: direct_fallback_available"+SEP+"Operator role: none"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nprint(json.dumps(data,ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
    fb=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem770_runtime_channel_blocker_not_claude_approval.md')
    fb.write_text('# BEM-770 | RUNTIME CHANNEL BLOCKER | NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: BLOCKED'+sep+'Why no previous response: workflow_run wake path is not proven by repo state.'+sep+'Runtime/trigger status: direct state fallback installed; real Claude runtime still not proven.'+sep+'Blocking reason: WORKFLOW_RUN_WAKE_PATH_NOT_PROVEN.'+sep+'Required fix: use direct dispatch/state channel or verify GitHub workflow dispatch externally; do not use operator as relay.'+sep+'Final recommendation: continue real Claude runtime repair; do not treat this as architecture approval.'+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem770_next_direct_runtime_repair.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-770 Next Direct Runtime Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-770 WAKE ROUTE EXECUTED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'execute_wake_smoke_route.v1','bem':'BEM-770','status':status,'previous_status':prev_status,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem770_execute_wake_smoke_route.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem770_execute_wake_smoke_route.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-770 | Execute Wake Smoke Route | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem770_execute_wake_smoke_route','status':status,'previous_status':prev_status,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem770_execute_wake_smoke_route.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-770 '+status+' previous='+prev_status+'\n')
changed=[str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)]
if status=='direct_dispatch_fallback_installed':
    changed.extend(['scripts/direct_claude_runtime_state_fallback.py','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem770_runtime_channel_blocker_not_claude_approval.md'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed wake-smoke route; installed direct state-producing fallback if workflow_run wake path is not proven, without faking Claude approval')
"""
No issue comments.
